settings.title: About Moon Ridge
settings.shaper_note: Hours may vary based on private events.
settings.highlight_1_text: Stop by during store hours — no appointment required.
settings.highlight_2_text: Expert fitting and shaping Thursday through Saturday.
settings.highlight_3_text: Birthdays, bridal parties, and corporate events.

settings.question: Where are you located?
settings.answer: We are proudly located just 2 doors south of the bowling alley on College Avenue in Fayetteville, Arkansas.

settings.question: Do you shape hats bought from other stores?
settings.answer: Yes, absolutely. If you bring in a hat from somewhere else, our expert cleaning and shaping service is $35. (If you purchase a hat at Moon Ridge Co., custom shaping is always complimentary.)

settings.question: When do you shape hats?
settings.answer: We have staff in the store Monday through Saturday to help you, but our master hat shapers are in Thursday through Saturday. We also host special events that may occasionally affect our hours, so be sure to check our website for the latest updates.

settings.question: Do I need an appointment for hat shaping?
settings.answer: Walk-ins are always welcome! However, we highly recommend booking a 'Free Hat Experience' appointment. One-on-one time is our specialty, and booking an appointment ensures we have dedicated time to perfectly fit and shape your hat.
